title: Asian Paints Digital Technologies is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Asian Paints Digital Technologies is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Asian Paints Digital Technologies is actively seeking a talented and motivated Quality Control Engineer to join our dynamic team in Ludhiana. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Asian Paints Digital Technologies:
Asian Paints Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in APQP

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Asian Paints Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
